notes:
New Features

• Added complete license system support
• Added HWID-based activation and device locking
• Added automatic license validation on startup
• Added local license storage for faster sign-in experience
• Added license activity tracking support
• Added last-used tracking support
• Added improved update backend integration

Improvements

• Major backend infrastructure overhaul
• Improved application security and validation systems
• Improved update delivery and version management
• Enhanced reliability of startup authentication checks
• Improved overall stability and maintainability
• Refactored internal services for future expansion

Fixes

• Fixed various license validation edge cases
• Fixed activation handling inconsistencies
• Fixed HWID binding reliability issues
• Fixed backend communication issues
• General bug fixes and cleanup
